Derivatives valuation involves the application of
judgement and estimation in determining inputs
such as:
(cid:127) the risk-free rates
(cid:127) the forward rates using published rate
(cid:127) interest rate parity formula for other
currencies
(cid:127) the present value cashflow for each contract
using the applicable interest rate curves
Furthermore, certain valuation inputs used to
determine fair value may be non-observable. The
valuation of certain derivatives is sensitive to
these inputs as they are forward-looking and could
be affected by future economic and market
condition
